c74object.name: fluid.standardize~
c74object.description: Standardize a DataSet. Rescale using its mean(s) and standard deviation(s) in each dimension, such that each dimension has a mean of 0 and a standard deviation of 1.

discussion.p: Read more about fluid.standardize~ on the learn platform.
fluid.standardize~ is part of the Fluid Decomposition Toolkit of the FluCoMa project. For more explanations, learning material, and discussions on its musicianly uses, visit flucoma.org.

description.p: Name for this instance, so that it can be reused or referred to by other data objects. If none is given, a name will be generated

method.name: reset
method.digest: Return the object to its original state
method.description: Calling reset will change parameter values back to those the object was created with, i.e. any attribute values set in the box will be retained

method.name: refer
method.description: Changes the reference to the data in another named fluid.standardize~ object. Changes to the data stored in any referenced will be shared by all other similarly named fluid.standardize~ objects.

description.p: Fit model to a DataSet without applying scaling

ul.li:
dataSet:
The fluid.dataset~ to learn the statistics of (mean and standard deviation)

description.p: fit the model to the sourcedataset and then standardize the sourcedataset and write into destdataset

ul.li:
sourceDataSet:
The fluid.dataset~ to first fit to and then standardize

destDataSet:
The fluid.dataset~ to populate with standardized data

description.p: Standardize a fluid.dataset~, using the learned statistics from a previous call to fit

ul.li:
destDataSet:
The fluid.dataset~ to write the standardized data into

description.p: Standardize a data point, using the learned statistics from a previous call to fit

ul.li:
sourceBuffer:
A buffer~ with source data to standardize

destBuffer:
A buffer~ to write the standardized data into

description.p: Un-standardize a fluid.dataset~, using the learned statistics from a previous call to fit.

ul.li:
sourceDataSet:
The fluid.dataset~ to of data to transform from the standardized scale to the original scale.

destDataSet:
The fluid.dataset~ to write the transformed data to.

description.p: Un-standardize a data point, using the learned statistics from a previous call to fit

ul.li:
sourceBuffer:
A buffer~ with the data in the stadardized range

destBuffer:
A buffer~ to write the output of the transformation to

description.p: The number of columns (dimensions) in this model or dataset / labeset
Resets the internal state of the model
The number of data points (entries / observations) in this model or dataset / labeset

method.name: load
method.description: Replace the internal state of the object from a dict. The message should take the form load dictionary <dictid>

method.name: dump
method.digest: Dump the state of this object from the dump outlet as a dict.

method.name: read
method.description: Replace the internal state of the object from a JSON file on disk. With no argument, a file dialog will appear to choose the file. It is always executed at the lowest priority on the main thread, using deferlow internally.

method.name: write
method.description: Save the internal state of the object to a JSON file on disk. With no argument, a file dialog will appear to choose the file. It is always executed at the lowest priority on the main thread, using deferlow internally.

description.p: Enable warnings to be issued whenever a parameter value is constrained (e.g. clipped)
